content.en:
Before they died, these Boundary Breaking Geniuses of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm could not have imagined that they would die at the hands of Ye Tian, who had been in the Seven Bone Transformation Realm.

If they knew that Ye Tian was so demonic, where would they dare to provoke, they would definitely choose to run away directly!

Over time.

The bone transformation realm of Gu Heng Mountain and the ice beasts of the Ice Beast Palace fought frequently, and both sides had losses.

However, there are more Gu Heng Mountain Bone Transformation Realms here, and most of them are the ice beasts besieging the Ice Beast Palace.

As a result, the loss of the Ice Beast Palace was even more tragic.

And Ye Tian's command also fell a few patrol envoys, all of them were looking for the source stone on the other side, when the Ice Beast Palace's Bone Transformation Realm Ice Beast suddenly attacked, and he didn't have time to rescue it.

After all, in order to find the source stones on the other side of an area, they must be separated by a certain distance, and it is impossible to stay together!

But relatively speaking, the losses under Ye Tian's command are very small.

this day.

Ye Tian found dozens of other source stones.

He examined the source stones of the other side one by one.

Suddenly.

One of the source stones on the other side contained terrifying energy inside.

Moreover, this source stone on the other side seemed to sense the danger, and even wanted to escape.

"Give it to me!"

Void Imprisonment.

Ye Tian grabbed it with one hand, making it impossible for him to escape.

Now.

He has already affirmed the identity of this source stone on the other side, and it must be the mother of the source stone on the other side.

"I didn't expect that I would find the other side of the source stone mother!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This time, he didn't use the other side of the source beast to copy the body, he relied on his own to find it slowly, and his luck was really against the sky, and he found the other side of the source stone mother.

Of course.

This piece of the Mother of Source Stones on the Other Shore will definitely be given to Gu Heng Mountain, but he will definitely get a lot of rewards for the Source Stones on the Other Side.

The key is that Gu Heng Mountain is just him and the Lord of the Ancient Void, two other shore-level geniuses, so he can definitely exchange a lot of source stones from the other side.

He immediately contacted the Lord of Eternal Zero of Gu Heng Mountain.

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked him to immediately come out of this eighth-level personality world and bring it back to Guheng Mountain from this Origin Stone Mother on the other side.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian handed over the envoy and patrol envoy under his command to another lord, and he immediately came out of this world.

......

Subsequently.

He immediately used the Cave Extreme Escape Method, a magical technique on the other side, and quickly returned to Guheng Mountain.

However.

He had just escaped when a monstrous hand crossed the void, as if ignoring the distance, pulling away the void he was.

That's when it happened.

Click!

A finger from the void shattered the beast with a finger.

"Lord of the Ice Soul, your dignified Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor has made a move on the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, it's too much!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero said coldly.

None of them were here, they were just fighting each other from a distance.

"Seven Bone Transformation Realms, hehe, this is your Gu Heng Mountain's Seven Bone Transformation Realm-level geniuses, killing one of him is enough to make you feel distressed. You all dare to start a war with our Ice Beast Palace, isn't it normal for me to kill one of you as a genius of the other side?"

"This little guy came out of this eighth-level world in a hurry, and he was in a hurry to return to Guheng Mountain, didn't he find the Yuan Shi Mu on the other side, right?"

The Lord of the Ice Soul was just a casual guess.

However, this is the truth.

Thundered!!!!

The Lord of Eternal Zero fought through the air and intercepted the Lord of the Ice Soul, while Ye Tian continued to shuttle back to Guheng Mountain.

Along.

He was not intercepted again, so he found and shuttled towards Guheng Mountain very smoothly.

After some time, he successfully reached Guheng Mountain.

......

Subsequently.

He handed over the other side of the source stone mother to the other deputy mountain masters stationed in Guheng Mountain.

Immediately after, he returned to that eighth-level world.

In the following days, he continued to search for the source stone on the other side in that eighth-level world, and if he found other resources, he would also take them with him.

And as the losses of Gu Heng Mountain and the Ice Beast Palace became bigger and bigger, the two sides also fought with real fire, and even the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Realm began to fight desperately.

this day.

One of the deputy mountain masters of Guheng Mountain was hit hard and almost fell, so he escaped in time and returned to Guheng Mountain for repair.

And there was also an Origin Realm Ice Beast in the Ice Beast Palace who was hit hard, and he had no choice but to retreat.

After a long time.

Almost none of the Origin Realms were still intact, and the Bone Transformation Realms on both sides had also suffered heavy losses.

Finally, under the mediation of other forces, they sat down and talked.

And the regulating forces have also gained a little benefit, such as being able to send the Bone Transformation Realm into this eighth-level personality world to find resources, and so on.

Eventually, the adjustment was completed.

Gu Heng Mountain and the Ice Beast Palace can't continue to fight, they can send a certain number of bone transformation realms into this world to find resources, whoever finds it is whoever, once they come out, they are not allowed to do it.

But apparently, hands-on is allowed inside this world.

And other forces also have a small number of bone transformation realms that can enter, and everyone will work together to develop this eighth-level world.

And just like that, the war ended.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of this eighth-level world and returned to Guheng Mountain.

As soon as he could, he came to see the Lord of Eternal Zero.

When Ye Tian saw the Lord of Eternal Zero, the other party's face was pale, his breath was weak, and he couldn't even control his breath, obviously his injuries were not light.

But at this moment, Gu Hengshan had a lot of things to deal with, so he didn't have time to heal his injuries, and he had to help deal with some affairs.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, are you alright?"

Ye Tiandao.

"It's fine, it's just a little bit injured. The Lord of Eternal Zero waved his hand and said, "Lord of Endless, you have made a great contribution this time, you have found a piece of the Mother of Source Stones on the other side, and there are many Source Stones on the other side. This time, Gu Hengshan decided to directly let you advance to the fifth level of the Venerable Lord. "

"Thank you, Lord of Eternal Zero!"

Ye Tian was grateful.

In addition to being promoted to the Unranked Lord, he also received a large number of contribution points and rewards.

Suddenly.

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked, "Lord of Endless, you showed a strength comparable to that of an Ninth Bone Transformation Realm primeval-level genius in that eighth-level world, how did you do it?"

Ye Tian knew that he was going all out, so he couldn't keep it secret, but he didn't care about that.

Therefore, he directly confessed: "Lord of Eternal Zero, I have completed the golden incarnation of my entire body, and I have also comprehended the Origin Rules and refined the Origin Rules weapon, so I have such strength. "

"Sure enough!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero knew this information, but Ye Tian personally admitted that he was still very shocked.

The body was completely transformed into a golden body, comprehended the Origin Rules, and refined the Origin Rules weapon.

Either way, it's amazing.

Among them, the most demonic is the complete golden body on the other side, how did Ye Tian do it?

It is said that it is known that the golden body on the other side has turned into more than seventy percent, and the difficulty will become more and more terrifying.

However.

Ye Tian did not complete the golden body transformation of the other side little by little, but directly cultivated the golden body of Xuanyang and completed the golden body of the other side in one go, so he did not have this problem.
